inputs.text: Bachcha ko bukhar hai, thakaan mehsoos ho rahi hai, sar dard hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Mild fever and fatigue are common symptoms of viral fever

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Although less likely, bronchitis can also cause similar symptoms

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Unlikely at this stage, as symptoms are not specific to TB

inputs.text: Bachche ko sukhhi khaansi ho rahi hai, kabhi-kabhi gala dard hota hai

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Dry cough is a common symptom of bronchitis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Although possible, viral fever is less likely to cause dry cough

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Still unlikely, as symptoms are not specific to TB

inputs.text: Bachche ko khaansi 2 hafte se zyada ho gayi hai, raat ko bahut pasina aata hai, wazan bhi kam ho raha hai
inputs.image_desc: pale appearance, dark circles under eyes

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Prolonged cough, night sweats, and weight loss are cardinal signs of TB

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely, as symptoms have progressed beyond typical bronchitis

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Possible, but less likely than TB given the combination of symptoms

inputs.text: Bachche ki haalat bahut kharab ho gayi hai, bahut kamzor ho gaya hai, khaansi mein kabhi-kabhi khoon bhi aata hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Severe weakness and blood in sputum confirm TB diagnosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, as symptoms have progressed far beyond bronchitis

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, as symptoms are more consistent with TB
